testcase.name: test_invoice_validation_missing_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty body, got 502 assert 502 == 400 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: test_reports/backend_api_tests.py:43: in test_invoice_validation_missing_fields assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for empty body, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty body, got 502 E assert 502 == 400 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
